query: how does the application and request context stack work
note: AppContext / RequestContext push()/pop() and the context-local stacks live in ctx.py. Single, unambiguous gold.

query: how are signed-cookie sessions serialized and loaded
note: SessionInterface / SecureCookieSessionInterface open_session/save_session live in sessions.py. Single gold.

query: how does blueprint registration defer route setup
note: Blueprint.register + deferred BlueprintSetupState recording live in sansio/blueprints.py (the sans-io core). Hand-judged primary.

query: how does flask render a Jinja template
note: render_template / Environment wiring live entirely in templating.py. Single gold.

query: how does the CLI discover and load the application factory
note: ScriptInfo.load_app + factory discovery (find_app_by_string etc.) live in cli.py. Single gold.

query: how do I create a Flask application instance
note: The concrete Flask app class (app = Flask(__name__)) is defined in app.py — the canonical setup entry point.

query: how do I register a URL route with a view function
note: The @route decorator (Scaffold.route -> add_url_rule) — the idiomatic registration API — lives in sansio/scaffold.py.

query: how do I return a JSON response from a view
note: jsonify() — the user-facing JSON response helper — is exposed from flask.json (__init__.py).

query: how do I read configuration from environment variables or a file
note: Config.from_envvar / from_pyfile / from_object — the idiomatic config-loading API — live in config.py. Single gold.

query: how do I send a file download response
note: send_file / send_from_directory — the idiomatic file-response helpers — live in helpers.py.
